title: Update the statuses of rules
content:
Use this endpoint to turn on, turn off, or delete a group of rules. If updating the status of one rule fails, the whole operation will fail. If it happens, no rules will be updated. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/optimizer/rule/update/status/| /v1.3/optimizer/rule/update/status/| |Request parameter data type |`advertiser_id`: number|`advertiser_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {required}|string|Request message type
Allowed format: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {required}|string| Advertiser ID. | |rule_ids {required}|string[]| IDs of the rules that you want to update status.| |operate_type {required}|string| Operation type. Enum values: `TURN_ON`, `TURN_OFF`, `DELETE`.| |lang|string |Language of the response error message if there is an error occurred. Enum values: `ZH` (Simplified Chinese), `EN` (English)(default), `JA` (Japanese).| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "advertiser_id": 75960823018, "rule_ids":[6984697088064290818], "operate_type":"TURN_ON" } (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object|Returned data.| #|rule_ids |string[]|IDs of the rules whose status have been successfully updated.| |request_id|string| Unique ID of the request.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code JSON JSON) { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "202107290649000102450631992D08A251", "data": { "rule_ids": [ 6984697088064290818 ] } } (/code) ```
